seasonTagline: You radiate warmth and depth, harmonizing beautifully with rich, earthy, and vibrant tones.
skinDescription: Your skin has a warm, golden undertone, with a medium-deep depth that glows with natural richness.
hairDescription: Your hair is a deep, dark brown, almost black, with a warm, lustrous sheen.
eyeDescription: Your eyes are a deep, warm brown, with a soft, inviting presence.
seasonStory: You possess a striking combination of depth and warmth, naturally drawn to the rich hues of the earth. Your coloring has a clear, vibrant quality, allowing you to wear colors that are saturated and full of life, reminiscent of a lush forest or a spice market.

bestColors.name: Terracotta
bestColors.reason: Emphasizes your warm undertone and depth.

bestColors.name: Olive Green
bestColors.reason: Harmonizes beautifully with your natural skin tone.

bestColors.name: Rust
bestColors.reason: Brings out the richness in your complexion.

bestColors.name: Warm Brown
bestColors.reason: A fundamental neutral that enhances your depth.

bestColors.name: Mustard Yellow
bestColors.reason: A vibrant accent that complements your warm coloring.

bestColors.name: Deep Teal
bestColors.reason: Adds a touch of cool depth that still feels warm and rich.

bestColors.name: Caramel
bestColors.reason: A soft, warm neutral that highlights your skin.

bestColors.name: Forest Green
bestColors.reason: A deep, grounding color that enhances your natural tones.

bestColors.name: Burnt Orange
bestColors.reason: A bold, warm shade that makes your features pop.

bestColors.name: Deep Plum
bestColors.reason: A sophisticated and rich hue that adds depth.

bestColors.name: Warm Camel
bestColors.reason: A perfect neutral that is both grounding and warm.

bestColors.name: Rich Ochre
bestColors.reason: A warm, earthy tone that brings out your natural glow.

avoidColors.name: Pale Pink
avoidColors.reason: Washes out your warm undertones and lacks depth.

avoidColors.name: Icy Blue
avoidColors.reason: Too cool and light, clashes with your warm, deep coloring.

avoidColors.name: Pure White
avoidColors.reason: Too stark and cool, drains color from your complexion.

foundation.tip: Look for foundations with a warm, golden, or olive undertone that match your medium-deep skin tone.

celebrities.name: Shakira
celebrities.reason: Shares your warm, medium-deep skin tone, dark hair, and deep brown eyes, embodying the rich vibrancy of Deep Autumn.

celebrities.name: Selena Gomez
celebrities.reason: Her natural coloring, particularly her warm medium-deep skin and dark hair, aligns with the depth and warmth of the Deep Autumn palette.

celebrities.name: Priyanka Chopra Jonas
celebrities.reason: Possesses a similar depth and warmth in her skin, hair, and eyes, exemplifying the luxurious and earthy tones of Deep Autumn.

celebrities.name: Eva Mendes
celebrities.reason: Her rich, warm complexion and deep features perfectly capture the essence and beauty of the Deep Autumn season.
